title: Use tribal film camera image as full-screen hero background and apply green & saffron palette app-wide

requirements.text: Save the uploaded tribal film camera artwork (unnamed.jpg) as a static asset at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.jpg and use it as the full-screen background image for the hero section in LandingPage.tsx. The image must cover the entire hero section (object-fit: cover, full width and height). Apply a dark semi-transparent overlay (e.g. rgba(0,0,0,0.45)–0.55) on top of the image so that all hero text and the 'Join the Tribe' CTA button remain clearly legible. The existing hero content structure (headline, intro paragraph, CTA button) must be preserved and rendered on top of the background.

quotes: use it as full screen background for this section
Use this image as BG image for the landing page

acceptanceCriteria: The tribal film camera image (unnamed.jpg) fills the full width and height of the hero section with no white/solid-color gaps.
All existing hero text (AD TRIBE headline, intro paragraph, CTA) is visible and readable over the image.
A dark semi-transparent overlay is present between the image and the text to ensure readability.
The image does not appear outside the hero section (other sections are unaffected).

requirements.text: Retheme the entire application (all pages and components) with a color palette derived from the tribal film camera image: deep forest green (primary, e.g. ~#1a4a1a or #14421e), warm saffron/golden-amber (accent, e.g. ~#c8820a or #d4900a), and rich bronze/dark-gold for highlights. Replace the current amber/charcoal theme tokens in frontend/src/index.css, frontend/index.css, and frontend/tailwind.config.js with this new green-and-saffron palette. Update all components and pages that use the old theme tokens so buttons, headers, navigation, cards, badges, and interactive elements consistently use the new green and saffron palette. Text on dark backgrounds should use off-white or light cream; text on light backgrounds should use deep charcoal.

quotes: use a color pallette of green and saffron inspired from the image for the entire app overall

acceptanceCriteria: Primary brand color is a deep forest green visually consistent with the image background.
Accent/CTA color is warm saffron or golden-amber consistent with the glowing film strip in the image.
No blue or purple appears anywhere in the UI.
All pages (Landing, Dashboard, Profile, Connections, Registration, Success) use the new palette consistently.
Buttons, navigation items, and interactive highlights use the saffron/gold accent color.
CSS custom properties and Tailwind config tokens are updated; no hardcoded old amber/charcoal hex values remain for brand colors.

constraints: Do not alter frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or any files under frontend/src/components/ui.
Do not change the backend schema or Motoko logic.
The tribal film camera image must be served as a static asset from frontend/public/assets/generated/ — do not route it through the backend.
nonGoals: Changing the layout structure or content of the hero section (headline, paragraph, CTA).
Modifying the inline registration form functionality.

edits: Resize and optimize to full-width hero dimensions (hero-bg.jpg — source: unnamed.jpg > hero-bg.dim_1080x1920.jpg)
